chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-246 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 04.11.2025 Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG. Ayaz Ahmed Soomro, Deputy Secretary Auqaf & Religious Affairs. ------------- Vide order dated 27.10.2025 we gave a last chance to the petitioner to appear in person and direct intimation notice was issued to the petitioner for today. However he chosen to remain absent without intimation. The order dated 27.10.2025 is reproduced below for ease of reference:- “This petition was last taken up on 25.02.2025 when none was present for the petitioner without intimation. Once-again, today, none appears for the petitioner without intimation. Perhaps this is because the petitioner in person and this case is not date by Court. Office shall issue direct intimation notice to the petitioner in person. To come up on 04.11.2025.” Despite this being a date by Court matter and a notice has been served upon the petitioner but he is called absent without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue the instant petition, which is over 18 months ago. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
